info.title: Scheduling API
info.description: REST API for appointment scheduling integrations

BearerAuth.description: Use your Better Auth API key as a Bearer token

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Use your Better Auth API key in the x-api-key header

get.description: Returns a basic service health status.
Returns locations for the active organization.
Returns one location by ID.
Returns calendars for the active organization.
Returns one calendar by ID.
Returns scheduling limits configured for a calendar, or null when it inherits organization defaults.

post.description: Creates or updates scheduling limits for a calendar to override organization defaults.

get.description: Returns resources for the active organization.
Returns one resource by ID.
Returns appointment types for the active organization.

post.description: Creates a new appointment type in the active organization.

get.description: Returns a single appointment type, including linked calendars and resources.
Lists calendars currently linked to an appointment type.

post.description: Links an existing calendar to an appointment type. This does not create a calendar.

calendarId.description: ID of an existing calendar to link to the appointment type.

delete.description: Removes an existing calendar link from an appointment type.

get.description: Lists resources currently linked to an appointment type.

post.description: Links an existing resource to an appointment type. This does not create a resource.

resourceId.description: ID of an existing resource to link to the appointment type.

quantityRequired.description: Quantity of this resource required for each appointment.

patch.description: Updates an existing resource link for an appointment type.

delete.description: Removes an existing resource link from an appointment type.

get.description: Returns dates that have at least one available appointment slot for the given query.
Returns appointment slots (times and remaining capacity) for the given query.
Checks whether a specific appointment slot is currently available.
Returns paginated appointments for the active organization with optional filters.

post.description: Creates a new appointment after validating availability constraints.

get.description: Returns appointments in a date-time window for schedule views and availability checks.
Returns a single appointment and its related entities by ID.

patch.description: Updates mutable appointment fields such as notes.

delete.description: Cancels an appointment by ID and records cancellation metadata when provided.

post.description: Reschedules an existing appointment to a new start/end time without cancelling.
Records an appointment attendee as no-show without creating a cancellation.

get.description: Returns paginated clients for the active organization with optional search.

post.description: Creates a new client record for the active organization.

get.description: Returns a single client by ID.

patch.description: Updates an existing client by ID.

post.description: Returns clients for the provided IDs in input order.

get.description: Returns a single client using the external/by-reference identifier path.

delete.description: Deletes a client using the external/by-reference identifier path.

patch.description: Updates a client using the external/by-reference identifier path.

get.description: Returns appointment and status history for a client by ID.

get.summary: Get client history summary by reference
get.description: Returns appointment and status history for a client using a by-reference ID.
Returns custom attribute definitions configured for clients in the active organization.

post.description: Creates a new client custom attribute definition used for client profile fields.

get.description: Returns current and maximum custom-attribute slot usage for the active organization.

patch.description: Updates a client custom attribute definition by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a client custom attribute definition by ID.

put.description: Updates display ordering for client custom attribute definitions.
